turns.name: Resolve account
turns.user: Resolve the AD user przemyslaw.klys and return canonical identity fields (samAccountName, UPN, SID, DN).

turns.name: Authoritative last logon
turns.user: Find the user's latest authoritative lastLogon value by checking relevant DCs and return exact UTC timestamp plus source DC.

turns.name: Timestamp semantics
turns.user: Compare lastLogon vs lastLogonTimestamp for this user and explain replication/currency caveats.

turns.name: Eventlog correlation
turns.user: Correlate with recent security log evidence (4624/4625/4768/4769/4771) around the latest sign-in window.

turns.name: Session characteristics
turns.user: If available, include client host/IP, logon type, and whether logons were interactive/network/service.

turns.name: Failure signal
turns.user: Highlight any failed logon bursts or suspicious Kerberos failures for this identity in the last 7 days.

turns.name: Confidence rating
turns.user: Rate confidence in the final last-logon answer and state exact blockers if confidence is reduced.

turns.name: Follow-up checks
turns.user: Provide top next checks to validate account hygiene (stale sessions, risky paths, unusual auth patterns).

turns.name: Responder-ready note
turns.user: Produce a compact handoff note for another engineer with the final answer and key evidence.

turns.name: Compact summary
turns.user: Summarize final user-logon findings in 6 bullets with exact UTC timestamps and key evidence IDs.
